observe.cmd: python3 -c 'import json; pp=json.load(open(".project/plan-phase.json"))["plan-phase"]; print([(i["id"], i["status"]) for i in pp if i["id"]=="PLAN-PHASE-006"])'
python3 -c 'import json,collections; it=json.load(open(".project/issues.json"))["issues"]; print("project_issue_statuses:", dict(collections.Counter(i["status"] for i in it)), "total:", len(it))'

python3 -c 'import json; p=[i for i in json.load(open(".project/issues.json"))["issues"] if i["status"]=="open"]; c=json.load(open(".context/issues.json"))["issues"]; pt={i.get("title","").strip().lower() for i in p}; ct={i.get("title","").strip().lower() for i in c}; print("project_open:", len(p), "context_issues:", len(c), "title_overlap:", len(pt & ct))'

history.note: PLAN-PHASE-006 reads status=pending with no successor record; .project issues store holds 68 open of 91 total (finding statement says 89 open - count at this sha is 68; verdict unaffected); .context/issues.json holds 12 pi-context-era issues with zero title overlap, so no disposition of the open corpus exists in .context. Forgotten-not-visible under the working-substrate gate. Intent-spec cross-check: no intent supersedes .project-to-.context reconciliation (IN-93 is vocabulary only).

observe.cmd: python3 -c 'import json; pp=json.load(open(".project/plan-phase.json"))["plan-phase"]; print([(i["id"], i["status"]) for i in pp if i["id"]=="PLAN-PHASE-007"])'

python3 -c 'import json,collections; g=json.load(open(".project/framework-gaps.json"))["gaps"]; print("gap_statuses:", dict(collections.Counter(x["status"] for x in g))); print("named:", [(x["id"], x["status"], x.get("priority")) for x in g if x["id"] in ("FGAP-002","FGAP-003","FGAP-005","FGAP-153","FGAP-157","FGAP-168")])'

python3 -c 'import json; g=[x for x in json.load(open(".project/framework-gaps.json"))["gaps"] if x["status"] in ("identified","in-progress")]; c=json.load(open(".context/framework-gaps.json"))["gaps"]; pt={x.get("title","").strip().lower() for x in g}; ct={x.get("title","").strip().lower() for x in c}; print("project_nonterminal:", len(g), "context_gaps:", len(c), "title_overlap:", len(pt & ct))'

python3 -c 'import json; s=json.load(open(".context/schemas/conventions.schema.json")); item=s["properties"]["rules"]["items"]; print("item_required:", item["required"]); print("item_properties:", sorted(item["properties"].keys()))'
